  Use these endpoints to create, update, list, and manage workflows, and to invoke them

# bem_workflow (Resource)

Workflows orchestrate one or more functions into a directed acyclic graph (DAG) for document processing.

Use these endpoints to create, update, list, and manage workflows, and to invoke them
with file input via `POST /v3/workflows/{workflowName}/call`.

The call endpoint accepts files as either multipart form data or JSON with base64-encoded
content. In the Bem CLI, use `@path/to/file` inside JSON values to automatically read and
encode files:

```
bem workflows call --workflow-name my-workflow \
  --input.single-file '{"inputContent": "@file.pdf", "inputType": "pdf"}' \
  --wait
```

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "bem_workflow" "example_workflow" {
  main_node_name = "mainNodeName"
  name = "name"
  nodes = [{
    function = {
      id = "id"
      name = "name"
      version_num = 0
    }
    metadata = {

    }
    name = "name"
  }]
  connectors = [{
    name = "name"
    type = "paragon"
    connector_id = "connectorID"
    paragon = {
      configuration = {

      }
      integration = "integration"
    }
  }]
  display_name = "displayName"
  edges = [{
    destination_node_name = "destinationNodeName"
    source_node_name = "sourceNodeName"
    destination_name = "destinationName"
    metadata = {

    }
  }]
  tags = ["string"]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `main_node_name` (String) Name of the entry-point node. Must not be a destination of any edge.
- `name` (String) Unique name for the workflow. Must match `^[a-zA-Z0-9_-]{1,128}$`.
- `nodes` (Attributes List) Call-site nodes in the DAG. At least one is required. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--nodes))

### Optional

- `connectors` (Attributes List) Connectors to attach to the workflow at creation. If any entry fails to
provision, the entire workflow creation is rolled back. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--connectors))
- `display_name` (String) Human-readable display name.
- `edges` (Attributes List) Directed edges between nodes. Omit or leave empty for single-node workflows. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--edges))
- `tags` (List of String) Tags to categorize and organize the workflow.

### Read-Only

- `audit` (Attributes) Audit trail information. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--audit))
- `connector_errors` (Attributes List) Per-connector failures from the diff/apply phase. Empty or omitted when all
operations succeeded. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--connector_errors))
- `created_at` (String) The date and time the workflow was created.
- `email_address` (String) Inbound email address associated with the workflow, if any.
- `error` (String) Error message if the workflow retrieval failed.
- `id` (String) Unique name for the workflow. Must match `^[a-zA-Z0-9_-]{1,128}$`.
- `updated_at` (String) The date and time the workflow was last updated.
- `version_num` (Number) Version number of this workflow version.
- `workflow` (Attributes) V3 read representation of a workflow version. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--workflow))

<a id="nestedatt--nodes"></a>
### Nested Schema for `nodes`

Required:

- `function` (Attributes) The function (and version) to execute at this call site. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--nodes--function))

Optional:

- `metadata` (String) Opaque free-form JSON object attached to this node. Stored and returned
verbatim; the server does not interpret it. Intended for client-side
concerns such as canvas display properties (position, color, collapsed
state, etc.).
- `name` (String) Name for this call site. Must be unique within the workflow version.
Defaults to the function's own name when omitted.

<a id="nestedatt--nodes--function"></a>
### Nested Schema for `nodes.function`

Optional:

- `id` (String) Unique identifier of function. Provide either id or name, not both.
- `name` (String) Name of function. Must be UNIQUE on a per-environment basis. Provide either id or name, not both.
- `version_num` (Number) Version number of function.



<a id="nestedatt--connectors"></a>
### Nested Schema for `connectors`

Required:

- `name` (String) Human-friendly connector name.
- `type` (String) Discriminator for a workflow connector. V3 supports `paragon` only.
Available values: "paragon".

Optional:

- `connector_id` (String) Present → update. Absent → create.
- `paragon` (Attributes) Request-side config block for a Paragon connector. Fields absent on update are unchanged. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--connectors--paragon))

<a id="nestedatt--connectors--paragon"></a>
### Nested Schema for `connectors.paragon`

Optional:

- `configuration` (String) Opaque per-integration configuration. Required on create.
- `integration` (String) Paragon integration key. Required on create.



<a id="nestedatt--edges"></a>
### Nested Schema for `edges`

Required:

- `destination_node_name` (String) Name of the destination node.
- `source_node_name` (String) Name of the source node.

Optional:

- `destination_name` (String) Labelled outlet on the source node that activates this edge.
Omit for the default (unlabelled) outlet.
- `metadata` (String) Opaque free-form JSON object attached to this edge. Stored and returned
verbatim; the server does not interpret it.


<a id="nestedatt--audit"></a>
### Nested Schema for `audit`

Read-Only:

- `version_created_by` (Attributes) Information about who created the current version. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--audit--version_created_by))
- `workflow_created_by` (Attributes) Information about who created the workflow. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--audit--workflow_created_by))
- `workflow_last_updated_by` (Attributes) Information about who last updated the workflow. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--audit--workflow_last_updated_by))

<a id="nestedatt--audit--version_created_by"></a>
### Nested Schema for `audit.version_created_by`

Read-Only:

- `api_key_name` (String) API key name. Present for API key-initiated actions.
- `created_at` (String) The date and time the action was created.
- `email_address` (String) Email address. Present for email-initiated actions.
- `user_action_id` (String) Unique identifier of the user action.
- `user_email` (String) User's email address. Present for user-initiated actions.
- `user_id` (String) User's ID. Present for user-initiated actions.


<a id="nestedatt--audit--workflow_created_by"></a>
### Nested Schema for `audit.workflow_created_by`

Read-Only:

- `api_key_name` (String) API key name. Present for API key-initiated actions.
- `created_at` (String) The date and time the action was created.
- `email_address` (String) Email address. Present for email-initiated actions.
- `user_action_id` (String) Unique identifier of the user action.
- `user_email` (String) User's email address. Present for user-initiated actions.
- `user_id` (String) User's ID. Present for user-initiated actions.


<a id="nestedatt--audit--workflow_last_updated_by"></a>
### Nested Schema for `audit.workflow_last_updated_by`

Read-Only:

- `api_key_name` (String) API key name. Present for API key-initiated actions.
- `created_at` (String) The date and time the action was created.
- `email_address` (String) Email address. Present for email-initiated actions.
- `user_action_id` (String) Unique identifier of the user action.
- `user_email` (String) User's email address. Present for user-initiated actions.
- `user_id` (String) User's ID. Present for user-initiated actions.



<a id="nestedatt--connector_errors"></a>
### Nested Schema for `connector_errors`

Read-Only:

- `code` (String) Machine-readable error code.
- `connector_id` (String) Populated for update/delete failures.
- `message` (String) Human-readable error message.
- `name` (String) Populated for create failures.
- `operation` (String) Which diff operation was attempted.
Available values: "create", "update", "delete".


<a id="nestedatt--workflow"></a>
### Nested Schema for `workflow`

Read-Only:

- `audit` (Attributes) Audit trail information. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--workflow--audit))
- `connectors` (Attributes List) Connectors currently attached to this workflow. For version-scoped reads
(`/versions/{n}`) this is always empty — connectors are current-state and
not part of version history. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--workflow--connectors))
- `created_at` (String) The date and time the workflow was created.
- `display_name` (String) Human-readable display name.
- `edges` (Attributes List) All directed edges in this workflow version's DAG. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--workflow--edges))
- `email_address` (String) Inbound email address associated with the workflow, if any.
- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the workflow.
- `main_node_name` (String) Name of the entry-point call-site node.
- `name` (String) Unique name of the workflow within the environment.
- `nodes` (Attributes List) All call-site nodes in this workflow version's DAG. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--workflow--nodes))
- `tags` (List of String) Tags associated with the workflow.
- `updated_at` (String) The date and time the workflow was last updated.
- `version_num` (Number) Version number of this workflow version.

<a id="nestedatt--workflow--audit"></a>
### Nested Schema for `workflow.audit`

Read-Only:

- `version_created_by` (Attributes) Information about who created the current version. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--workflow--audit--version_created_by))
- `workflow_created_by` (Attributes) Information about who created the workflow. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--workflow--audit--workflow_created_by))
- `workflow_last_updated_by` (Attributes) Information about who last updated the workflow. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--workflow--audit--workflow_last_updated_by))

<a id="nestedatt--workflow--audit--version_created_by"></a>
### Nested Schema for `workflow.audit.version_created_by`

Read-Only:

- `api_key_name` (String) API key name. Present for API key-initiated actions.
- `created_at` (String) The date and time the action was created.
- `email_address` (String) Email address. Present for email-initiated actions.
- `user_action_id` (String) Unique identifier of the user action.
- `user_email` (String) User's email address. Present for user-initiated actions.
- `user_id` (String) User's ID. Present for user-initiated actions.


<a id="nestedatt--workflow--audit--workflow_created_by"></a>
### Nested Schema for `workflow.audit.workflow_created_by`

Read-Only:

- `api_key_name` (String) API key name. Present for API key-initiated actions.
- `created_at` (String) The date and time the action was created.
- `email_address` (String) Email address. Present for email-initiated actions.
- `user_action_id` (String) Unique identifier of the user action.
- `user_email` (String) User's email address. Present for user-initiated actions.
- `user_id` (String) User's ID. Present for user-initiated actions.


<a id="nestedatt--workflow--audit--workflow_last_updated_by"></a>
### Nested Schema for `workflow.audit.workflow_last_updated_by`

Read-Only:

- `api_key_name` (String) API key name. Present for API key-initiated actions.
- `created_at` (String) The date and time the action was created.
- `email_address` (String) Email address. Present for email-initiated actions.
- `user_action_id` (String) Unique identifier of the user action.
- `user_email` (String) User's email address. Present for user-initiated actions.
- `user_id` (String) User's ID. Present for user-initiated actions.



<a id="nestedatt--workflow--connectors"></a>
### Nested Schema for `workflow.connectors`

Read-Only:

- `connector_id` (String) Unique connector API ID.
- `name` (String) Human-friendly connector name.
- `paragon` (Attributes) Paragon-integration configuration on a workflow connector. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--workflow--connectors--paragon))
- `type` (String) Discriminator for a workflow connector. V3 supports `paragon` only.
Available values: "paragon".

<a id="nestedatt--workflow--connectors--paragon"></a>
### Nested Schema for `workflow.connectors.paragon`

Read-Only:

- `configuration` (String) Opaque per-integration configuration (e.g. `{"folderId": "..."}`).
- `integration` (String) Paragon integration key (e.g. "googledrive").
- `sync_id` (String) Paragon sync ID managed by the server. Read-only.



<a id="nestedatt--workflow--edges"></a>
### Nested Schema for `workflow.edges`

Read-Only:

- `destination_name` (String) Labelled outlet on the source node, if any.
- `destination_node_name` (String) Name of the destination node.
- `metadata` (String) Opaque free-form JSON object attached to this edge on create/update.
Returned verbatim; never interpreted by the server.
- `source_node_name` (String) Name of the source node.


<a id="nestedatt--workflow--nodes"></a>
### Nested Schema for `workflow.nodes`

Read-Only:

- `function` (Attributes) Function (and version) executing at this call site. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--workflow--nodes--function))
- `metadata` (String) Opaque free-form JSON object attached to this node on create/update.
Returned verbatim; never interpreted by the server.
- `name` (String) Name of this call site, unique within the workflow version.

<a id="nestedatt--workflow--nodes--function"></a>
### Nested Schema for `workflow.nodes.function`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) Unique identifier of function. Provide either id or name, not both.
- `name` (String) Name of function. Must be UNIQUE on a per-environment basis. Provide either id or name, not both.
- `version_num` (Number) Version number of function.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
$ terraform import bem_workflow.example '<workflow_name>'
```
